title: 150pcs Black Nylon Cable Ties (2.5mm × 150mm) 6 Inch NCS35® Heavy Duty, Self-Locking, UV Resistant, Multi-Purpose Plastic Cable Managment Tie Wraps 8kg Tensile Strength for Electrical,Nylon Zip Ties
features: Durable & Strong Performance – Crafted from high-quality premium Nylon, these 6 Inch Cable Clips (150mm × 2.5mm) black cable ties offer a dependable tensile strength of 8 kg, delivering consistent holding power for everyday fastening and cable securing tasks. Ideal for electrical wires, computer cables, DIY projects, and general household or workshop applications where reliable strength is needed.

Versatile Cable Management – Supporting a maximum bundle diameter of 35 mm, these self-locking zip ties are designed for neat and efficient organisation. Perfect for arranging computer wires, audio leads, TV cables, charging cords, small pipes, garden wiring, and automotive cables, helping maintain a tidy and professional setup in homes, offices, garages, and workspaces.

UV Resistant & Long-Lasting – Produced with durable UV-resistant nylon, these black cable ties are built to withstand outdoor exposure without cracking or weakening. Suitable for indoor and outdoor cable management, gardening, fencing, greenhouse support, and workshop use, making them a practical choice for technicians, electricians, and DIY users.

Reliable in Extreme Conditions – Engineered to perform within a wide temperature range of –45 °C to +85 °C, these nylon cable ties retain flexibility and strength in both cold and warm environments. Ideal for long-term installations, repairs, outdoor fixes, and everyday securing tasks in varied weather conditions.

Quick & Secure Self-Locking Design – Featuring a strong and efficient self-locking mechanism, these zip ties allow fast, tool-free installation with a firm grip that resists slipping or loosening. Great for bundling wire harnesses, organising office cables, fastening bags, securing lightweight items, and handling cable management needs across home, office, garden, garage, and professional settings.
description: Stay organised with these premium Black Nylon Cable Ties (150mm × 2.5mm) 6 Inch, designed for strong, secure and reliable cable management in everyday and professional use. Made from durable high-quality nylon, these self-locking zip ties provide a tensile strength of 8 kg, ensuring dependable fastening for electrical wires, computer cables, charging cords, and DIY projects. With a maximum bundle diameter of 35 mm, they are ideal for neatly organising cables in homes, offices, garages, workshops, and retail environments. The UV resistant material helps prevent brittleness, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor use including gardening, greenhouse support, fencing, and light industrial applications. Engineered to perform in temperatures from –45 °C to +85 °C, these cable ties maintain flexibility and strength in cold and warm conditions. The quick self-locking design allows fast, tool-free installation with a firm grip that prevents slipping or loosening. Perfect for cable management, wire bundling, automotive wiring, office setup, home organisation, and general multipurpose fastening tasks.
